Text: I just discovered the blueprint to build the best ai agents

it's my go-to for production -grade ai agents

this article  by @rohit4verse is pure gold

here is my key takeaway

>everyone thinks they have observability. they have logs.

>agents that build institutional memory as a side effect of doing their work

>the context window is a memory disorder
